entry.content:
Lissy93 merged Lissy93/dashy#2062 · April 13, 2026 06:30
Switches default public ip provider to ipinfo #2062

Category

Small change

Overview

For the public IP widget, the default provider is now ipinfo, which so far seems the most reliable.
